signals.reasoning: Cover the live TAO short immediately. The trade has gone from a small winner to a live loss, retained none of peak P&L, and the urgent warning means the thesis is no longer defensible on this timeframe.
BTC is constructive, but the active veto keeps benchmark exposure in watch mode rather than action mode.
ETH has mild bullish tone, but not enough edge to justify fresh risk while the event brake is active.
SOL remains too mixed to justify action under the veto regime.
LIT has momentum but not enough clean edge to justify a fresh trade here.
BLAST has a strong squeeze profile on paper, but the market quality is too poor to trust as a fresh long under veto conditions.
VVV lacks enough structural edge to justify action here.
REZ is another watch-only squeeze long because mechanics are strong and funding is negative, but veto keeps it out of the buy bucket.
ZEREBRO still lacks the quality and edge needed for action.
RESOLV remains a clean bearish lean because price is weak and funding still supports the short side.
CHILLGUY remains extended and crowded, which keeps it below the threshold for action under veto.
